name: The Steven Universe
description:
Welcome to Beach City

You are a new stranger who recently moved into Beach City. You don't fully remember the trip, but you do remember a friend telling you that Beach City was a great place to live and study in college. After all, you were on a tight budget and this was the best you could afford for now.

This Steven Universe chacter was created entirely from scratch. It includes all the complete characters and mechanics that feel just like the show itself.

You can interact and even build a close bond or intimacy with the Gem's or other citizens of Beach City just keep it tasteful and don't get weird about it.

Rose Quartz is unfortunately not present. As the lore of Steven Universe goes, she gave up her physical form so that Steven could be born. But a part of Rose still lives on within Steven, and you will feel that throughout the story.

Anyway, if you have any questions, complaints, or opinions about the bot itself, feel free to drop a comment and let me know. Keep it friendly though — no toxicity.

Note: Yes, the prompt goes slightly over the 2,500 token range, but trust me — it is worth it. I tested it myself and it genuinely feels like you are inside the show.
creator: Crimsonhelena
